˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ 𝗙𝗔𝗡𝗡𝗢𝗡 ; countryhumans. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

((ANGST // TW SELF H-RM)) ᶻ𝘇𐰁 ┈ ⟡

In the stillness of the night, you're roused from your slumber by a series of unfamiliar sounds. Unveiling the source, you find it to be none other than your Nordic sweetheart, Finland.

___

PS : my trial runs have been limited to OpenAI and I haven't had the chance to experiment with JanitorLLM or similar systems. So, if the AI ends up speaking for you, here's a workaround - try duplicating the 'jailbreak' prompt in the 'API settings' section, That's where you can insert your custom prompt! Or, just regenerate the message. hope this is helpful. <3
